name: Lithoquest Resources Inc.
summary: Lithoquest Resources Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mining properties. It holds a 100% interest in the North Kimberley diamond project located in the King George River region of Western Australia. The company was formerly known as Lithoquest Diamonds Inc. and changed its name to Lithoquest Resources Inc. in November 2020. Lithoquest Resources Inc. is headquartered in Salt Spring Island, Canada.
